languages.text: "Незавидный удел на склоне лет, но ничего не поделаешь".

traits.locale_text: "Незавидный удел на склоне лет, но ничего не поделаешь".

languages.text: "An unenviable fate in the twilight of one's life, but it cannot be helped."
languages.original_text: "Незавидный удел на склоне лет, но ничего не поделаешь".

traits.locale_text: "An unenviable fate in the twilight of one's life, but it cannot be helped."
"An unenviable fate in the twilight of one's life, but it cannot be helped."
"An unenviable fate in the twilight of one's life, but it cannot be helped."

languages.text: “晚年落得这种下场，确实不太体面，却也无可奈何。”
languages.original_text: "An unenviable fate in the twilight of one's life, but it cannot be helped."

traits.locale_text: “晚年落得这种下场，确实不太体面，却也无可奈何。”

languages.text: « Un bien triste sort pour quelqu'un qui se trouve déjà au crépuscule de sa vie, mais c'est ainsi. »
languages.original_text: "An unenviable fate in the twilight of one's life, but it cannot be helped."

traits.locale_text: « Un bien triste sort pour quelqu'un qui se trouve déjà au crépuscule de sa vie, mais c'est ainsi. »

languages.text: "Birinin ömrünün alaca karanlığında mücadelesi zor bir akıbet fakat elden ne gelir?"
languages.original_text: "An unenviable fate in the twilight of one's life, but it cannot be helped."

traits.locale_text: "Birinin ömrünün alaca karanlığında mücadelesi zor bir akıbet fakat elden ne gelir?"

languages.text: «Un destino nada envidiable en el crepúsculo de la vida, pero no hay nada que hacer».
languages.original_text: "An unenviable fate in the twilight of one's life, but it cannot be helped."

traits.locale_text: «Un destino nada envidiable en el crepúsculo de la vida, pero no hay nada que hacer».

languages.text: "Ein unglaubliches Schicksal im Zwielicht des Lebens, aber es hilft nichts."
languages.original_text: "An unenviable fate in the twilight of one's life, but it cannot be helped."

traits.locale_text: "Ein unglaubliches Schicksal im Zwielicht des Lebens, aber es hilft nichts."

languages.text: 晩年の不運な運命だが、仕方がない。
languages.original_text: "An unenviable fate in the twilight of one's life, but it cannot be helped."

traits.locale_text: 晩年の不運な運命だが、仕方がない。
